meta.question: What stakeholders are defined for the APS Mission?
meta.finalAnswer:
Based on the SPARQL queries against the SysML model, the stakeholders defined for the APS Mission are:

1. **APS Technician** - An actor found in the model associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case
2. **APS Researcher** - An actor found in the model associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case  
3. **VIP** - A sample actor found in the TMT-APS Model Information views, also associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case

These three actors (stakeholders) are the ones identified in the model that interact with the APS Mission use cases, particularly the "Calibrate APS" use case which is part of the APS Mission Use Cases package.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Mission"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the APS Mission as a block. Now need to explore its properties to find stakeholders. This is Exploration Step 2 - mapping properties.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Mission" . 
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

GROUP BY ?prop

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem a vocab:block .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Mission")))
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/block/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::Mission::APS%2520Mission> ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?uc ?ucName ?type WHERE {
  ?uc vocab:NamedElement_name ?ucName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?ucName)), LCASE("Mission Use Cases")))
  ?uc rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?pkgName ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?pkgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("Mission")))
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::Mission> ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found 3 actors (stakeholders) associated with APS-related use cases: APS Technician, APS Researcher, and VIP. These are the stakeholders defined for the APS Mission based on the actor-use case relationships in the model.

request.answer:
Based on the SPARQL queries against the SysML model, the stakeholders defined for the APS Mission are:

1. **APS Technician** - An actor found in the model associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case
2. **APS Researcher** - An actor found in the model associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case  
3. **VIP** - A sample actor found in the TMT-APS Model Information views, also associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case

These three actors (stakeholders) are the ones identified in the model that interact with the APS Mission use cases, particularly the "Calibrate APS" use case which is part of the APS Mission Use Cases package.

events.finalAnswer:
Based on the SPARQL queries against the SysML model, the stakeholders defined for the APS Mission are:

1. **APS Technician** - An actor found in the model associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case
2. **APS Researcher** - An actor found in the model associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case  
3. **VIP** - A sample actor found in the TMT-APS Model Information views, also associated with the "Calibrate APS" use case

These three actors (stakeholders) are the ones identified in the model that interact with the APS Mission use cases, particularly the "Calibrate APS" use case which is part of the APS Mission Use Cases package.
